nasb.text: It shall come about that whoever will not listen to My words which he shall speak in My name, I Myself will require it of him.

esv.text: And whoever will not listen to my words that he shall speak in my name, I myself will require it of him.

cnv.text: 如果有人不聽從他奉我的名所說的話，我必親自追討那人的罪。

ccb.text: 如果有人不听从他奉我的名所说的话，我必亲自惩罚那人。
